name: Mary
description:
|| 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐲 || 𝟏𝟗𝟓𝟎𝐬 || 𝐚𝐛𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐰𝐢𝐟𝐞 || 𝐂𝐖: 𝐓𝐈𝐌𝐄 𝐀𝐏𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐏𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐓𝐄 𝐌𝐘𝐒𝐎𝐆𝐎𝐍𝐘, 𝐇𝐎𝐌𝐎𝐏𝐇𝐎𝐁𝐈𝐀, 𝐏𝐎𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐀𝐋 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐅𝐋𝐈𝐂𝐓 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐒𝐈𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐖𝐀𝐑 𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍𝐒. 𝐀𝐁𝐀𝐃𝐎𝐍𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓.

It’s in the 1950s and you live in a close knit community. Word gets around quickly when a local housewife’s husband suddenly disappears from town. Mary Faulkner is now struggling to make ends meet as a single mother in this era…. 


Would you be willing to help her and her family or will you make it worse?

𝑪𝑹𝑬𝑨𝑻𝑶𝑹'𝑺 𝑵𝑶𝑻𝑬: Hello! I hope you like this bot :) It's my third bot here! I spend time on each of my creations here to make them as engaging as possible for you, so I would love reviews! Mary's husband has his own bot, Charles (https://janitorai.com/characters/9370d498-88e5-4902-a461-361d1cbc6479_character-charles) if you want to check him out too, it's a MLM bot. You can use any pov for Mary so whether you want to do a mlw, wlw, or simply platonic rp go for it :)

I was really struggling to decide whether I wanted this bot to be the way it is or if I wanted to make her user's wife but eventually decided to make it this way.

I appreciate reviews! I got my first review like yesterday and it made my day.

11/11/2024 update- made an alt where you are her husband! --> Mary-alt-scenario
